title: Madras High Court directs State to ensure no cow slaughter happens in public places during Bakrid
description: The Madras High Court on Wednesday directed the Tamil Nadu Chief Secretary and Director General of Police to ensure that cow slaughter is not carried out in public places or other non-designated areas during Bakrid [Surya Vs State].A Bench of Justice GR Swaminathan and V Lakshminarayanan said that slaughtering of animals cannot be permitted at any place of one’s choosing but must take place only in a slaughterhouse or in an area specifically designated by the competent authorities.“Slaughter can
